nasb.text: When all the men of Israel who had hidden themselves in the hill country of Ephraim heard that the Philistines had fled, even they also pursued them closely in the battle.

esv.text: Likewise, when all the men of Israel who had hidden themselves in the hill country of Ephraim heard that the Philistines were fleeing, they too followed hard after them in the battle.

cnv.text: 那些躲藏在以法蓮山地的以色列眾人一聽見非利士人逃跑，也就在戰場上緊緊追趕他們。

ccb.text: 那些躲在以法莲山区的以色列人听说非利士人溃逃，都出来紧紧地追杀他们。
